blended.narrative: Mount St. Louis Moonstone is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.0 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 4,645 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: light rain showers, highs of 49°F.
Saturday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
